---
title: "quarto.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\workflows\handshake_files\libs\quarto-html\quarto.js"
loc: 694
complexity: 83
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 5.67
overall_score: 1.06
---

## Intent
The `quarto.js` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on sectionChanged, layoutMarginEls, marginChildren, lastBottom, top, marginChildStyle, marginBottom, margin, styles, marginTop, resizeObserver, tocEl, sidebarEl, leftTocEl, marginSidebarEl, prevSiblingIsActiveLink, sibling, fireSlideEnter, event, tabs, distpatchShinyEvents, tocLinks, makeActive, removeActive, removeAllActive, anchor, heading, handleMouseout, sections, target, sectionMargin, currentActive, init, updateActiveLink, sectionIndex, current, inHiddenRegion, categorySelector, activateCategories, categoryEls, categoryText, link, linkEl, hasTitleCategories, offsetRelativeUrl, offset, offsetAbsoluteUrl, offset, baseUrl, projRelativeUrl, getMeta, metas, i, findAndActivateCategories, currentPagePath, response, listingHrefs, pathWithoutLeadingSlash, encodedItem, relative, baseUrl, resolvedPath, nearestListing, referredRelativePath, referrerListing, isListingReferrer, findNearestParentListing, relativeParts, path, manageSidebarVisiblity, isVisible, elRect, lastChildEl, convertToMenu, toggleContainer, toggleIcon, toggleTitle, titleEl, toggleContents, clone, positionToggle, tocShowing, clickEl, closeToggle, convertToSidebar, placeholderEl, elTop, elBottom, tabEls, id, columnEl, el, visibleCls, panelTabsetEl, prevSib, childNodes, marginScrollVisibility, sidebarScrollVisiblity, tocLeftScrollVisibility, conflictingEls, arrConflictingEls, leftSideConflictEls, rightSideConflictEls, hasMarginCaption, kOverlapPaddingSize, toRegions, boundRect, top, hasObserved, visibleItemObserver, visibleElements, intersectionObserver, rightElementObserver, leftElementObserver, hideOverlappedSidebars, slowTransition, manageTransition, el, readerMode, highlightReaderToggle, els, setReaderModeValue, isReaderMode, localReaderMode, tocOpenDepthStr, tocOpenDepth, walk, isActiveNode, hasActiveChild, throttle, waiting, nexttick. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via sectionChanged, layoutMarginEls, marginChildren, lastBottom, top, marginChildStyle, marginBottom, margin, styles, marginTop, resizeObserver, tocEl, sidebarEl, leftTocEl, marginSidebarEl, prevSiblingIsActiveLink, sibling, fireSlideEnter, event, tabs, distpatchShinyEvents, tocLinks, makeActive, removeActive, removeAllActive, anchor, heading, handleMouseout, sections, target, sectionMargin, currentActive, init, updateActiveLink, sectionIndex, current, inHiddenRegion, categorySelector, activateCategories, categoryEls, categoryText, link, linkEl, hasTitleCategories, offsetRelativeUrl, offset, offsetAbsoluteUrl, offset, baseUrl, projRelativeUrl, getMeta, metas, i, findAndActivateCategories, currentPagePath, response, listingHrefs, pathWithoutLeadingSlash, encodedItem, relative, baseUrl, resolvedPath, nearestListing, referredRelativePath, referrerListing, isListingReferrer, findNearestParentListing, relativeParts, path, manageSidebarVisiblity, isVisible, elRect, lastChildEl, convertToMenu, toggleContainer, toggleIcon, toggleTitle, titleEl, toggleContents, clone, positionToggle, tocShowing, clickEl, closeToggle, convertToSidebar, placeholderEl, elTop, elBottom, tabEls, id, columnEl, el, visibleCls, panelTabsetEl, prevSib, childNodes, marginScrollVisibility, sidebarScrollVisiblity, tocLeftScrollVisibility, conflictingEls, arrConflictingEls, leftSideConflictEls, rightSideConflictEls, hasMarginCaption, kOverlapPaddingSize, toRegions, boundRect, top, hasObserved, visibleItemObserver, visibleElements, intersectionObserver, rightElementObserver, leftElementObserver, hideOverlappedSidebars, slowTransition, manageTransition, el, readerMode, highlightReaderToggle, els, setReaderModeValue, isReaderMode, localReaderMode, tocOpenDepthStr, tocOpenDepth, walk, isActiveNode, hasActiveChild, throttle, waiting, nexttick. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://./tabsets/tabsets.js)
- [*](file://./axe/axe-check.js)

### Exports
- `sectionChanged`
- `layoutMarginEls`
- `marginChildren`
- `lastBottom`
- `top`
- `marginChildStyle`
- `marginBottom`
- `margin`
- `styles`
- `marginTop`
- `resizeObserver`
- `tocEl`
- `sidebarEl`
- `leftTocEl`
- `marginSidebarEl`
- `prevSiblingIsActiveLink`
- `sibling`
- `fireSlideEnter`
- `event`
- `tabs`
- `distpatchShinyEvents`
- `tocLinks`
- `makeActive`
- `removeActive`
- `removeAllActive`
- `anchor`
- `heading`
- `handleMouseout`
- `sections`
- `target`
- `sectionMargin`
- `currentActive`
- `init`
- `updateActiveLink`
- `sectionIndex`
- `current`
- `inHiddenRegion`
- `categorySelector`
- `activateCategories`
- `categoryEls`
- `categoryText`
- `link`
- `linkEl`
- `hasTitleCategories`
- `offsetRelativeUrl`
- `offset`
- `offsetAbsoluteUrl`
- `offset`
- `baseUrl`
- `projRelativeUrl`
- `getMeta`
- `metas`
- `i`
- `findAndActivateCategories`
- `currentPagePath`
- `response`
- `listingHrefs`
- `pathWithoutLeadingSlash`
- `encodedItem`
- `relative`
- `baseUrl`
- `resolvedPath`
- `nearestListing`
- `referredRelativePath`
- `referrerListing`
- `isListingReferrer`
- `findNearestParentListing`
- `relativeParts`
- `path`
- `manageSidebarVisiblity`
- `isVisible`
- `elRect`
- `lastChildEl`
- `convertToMenu`
- `toggleContainer`
- `toggleIcon`
- `toggleTitle`
- `titleEl`
- `toggleContents`
- `clone`
- `positionToggle`
- `tocShowing`
- `clickEl`
- `closeToggle`
- `convertToSidebar`
- `placeholderEl`
- `elTop`
- `elBottom`
- `tabEls`
- `id`
- `columnEl`
- `el`
- `visibleCls`
- `panelTabsetEl`
- `prevSib`
- `childNodes`
- `marginScrollVisibility`
- `sidebarScrollVisiblity`
- `tocLeftScrollVisibility`
- `conflictingEls`
- `arrConflictingEls`
- `leftSideConflictEls`
- `rightSideConflictEls`
- `hasMarginCaption`
- `kOverlapPaddingSize`
- `toRegions`
- `boundRect`
- `top`
- `hasObserved`
- `visibleItemObserver`
- `visibleElements`
- `intersectionObserver`
- `rightElementObserver`
- `leftElementObserver`
- `hideOverlappedSidebars`
- `slowTransition`
- `manageTransition`
- `el`
- `readerMode`
- `highlightReaderToggle`
- `els`
- `setReaderModeValue`
- `isReaderMode`
- `localReaderMode`
- `tocOpenDepthStr`
- `tocOpenDepth`
- `walk`
- `isActiveNode`
- `hasActiveChild`
- `throttle`
- `waiting`
- `nexttick`
